services.subtitle: Our Services
services.title: Comprehensive Solar & Energy Solutions
services.description: From rooftop solar to utility-scale farms, we design, build, and maintain clean energy systems across California.

residential.title: Residential Solar
residential.description: Custom-designed rooftop solar systems for your home. Reduce your electric bill by up to 90% with premium Tier-1 panels and expert installation.

commercial.title: Commercial Solar
commercial.description: Scalable solar solutions for businesses, warehouses, and retail. Maximize your ROI with accelerated depreciation.

battery.title: Battery Storage
battery.description: Tesla Powerwall and Enphase IQ Battery installations. Store solar energy, protect against outages, and optimize your time-of-use savings.

ev.title: EV Charger Installation
ev.description: Level 2 and DC fast charger installations for homes, businesses, and multi-family properties. Future-proof your property for electric vehicles.

carport.title: Solar Carports
carport.description: Dual-purpose structures that protect vehicles while generating clean energy. Ideal for commercial parking lots, schools, and HOA communities.

farm.title: Solar Farm & BESS
farm.description: Utility-scale solar farms and Battery Energy Storage Systems. End-to-end EPC from land assessment to grid interconnection.

block1.name: Full In-House Team
block1.tagline: Design to commissioning, all under one roof
block1.description: We don't subcontract your project out. Our team of licensed engineers, certified electricians, and dedicated project managers handle every phase — ensuring quality, accountability, and seamless communication from day one.
block1.feature1: Licensed PE engineers for system design

block2.name: Veteran-Owned, Mission-Driven
block2.description: Founded by veterans, Nason Solar operates with the precision, accountability, and honor that military service instills. We treat every project like a mission — with meticulous planning, flawless execution, and no shortcuts.

block3.name: Tesla & Enphase Certified
block3.tagline: The industry's most trusted brands, installed by experts
block3.description: As a Tesla Certified Installer and Enphase Platinum Partner, we provide access to the most advanced solar and storage technology available — backed by manufacturer warranties and our own workmanship guarantee.

process.subtitle: How It Works
process.title: From Consultation to Clean Energy in 6 Steps

step1.title: Free Consultation & Site Assessment
step1.description: We evaluate your property, energy usage, and goals to determine the best solar solution.

step2.title: Custom System Design
step2.description: Our engineers design a system optimized for maximum production and return on investment.

step3.title: Permits & Procurement
step3.description: We handle all permits, HOA approvals, utility interconnection applications, and equipment procurement.

step4.title: Professional Installation
step4.description: Our certified crew installs your system with precision, typically completed in 1-3 days for residential.

step5.title: Inspection & Grid Connection
step5.description: We coordinate city inspections and utility approval to get your system connected and producing.

step6.title: Monitoring & Maintenance
step6.description: 24/7 system monitoring with proactive maintenance to ensure peak performance for decades.

process.ctaText: Ready to get started? Let's design your solar system.

testimonials.subtitle: Customer Stories
testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Hear from homeowners and businesses across Southern California who made the switch to solar.

items.name: Michael Chen
items.quote: Nason Solar handled everything from permits to installation in 6 weeks. Our electric bill went from $380/month to near zero. The team was professional and cleaned up perfectly after every day's work.

items.name: Jennifer Park
items.quote: We installed solar on three commercial properties. Nason delivered on time and under budget for all three. Their in-house team made coordination seamless — one call handled everything.

items.name: Robert Garcia
items.quote: Being a veteran myself, I wanted to work with a fellow vet-owned business. These guys brought the same standards I recognize from service — structured, thorough, no excuses. Highly recommend.

items.name: Lisa Wang
items.quote: The solar carport project for our community was complex — 45 parking spaces, permits, HOA board approvals. Nason navigated every challenge smoothly. Residents are thrilled with both the shade and the savings.

items.name: David Kim
items.quote: After the power outages we've had, backup storage was non-negotiable. The Enphase system has kept our house running through three outages since install. Worth every penny.

items.name: Sarah Thompson
items.quote: The ROI analysis they provided was detailed and accurate. We hit payback in 4.2 years, exactly as projected. Their transparency about costs and savings is rare in this industry.

faq.subtitle: Common Questions
faq.title: Solar Questions, Answered
faq.description: Everything you need to know about going solar with Nason Solar.
faq.q1: How much does solar cost in Southern California?
faq.q1a: A typical residential system costs $15,000–$35,000. Commercial systems vary by size. We provide a detailed, itemized proposal at no cost.
faq.q2: How long does the entire process take from start to finish?
faq.q2a: Most residential installations are completed in 4–8 weeks: 1–2 weeks for design and engineering, 2–4 weeks for permits and utility approval, and 1–3 days for installation. Commercial projects typically take 8–16 weeks depending on scope.
faq.q3a: We provide a 25-year panel performance warranty, 10–25 year inverter warranty, and our own 10-year workmanship warranty. Tesla Powerwall comes with a 10-year warranty. We stand behind every installation we complete.
faq.q4a: We work with top-tier solar lenders offering $0-down loans, low fixed rates, and terms from 5–25 years. We also offer solar leases and PACE financing (Property Assessed Clean Energy) for qualifying properties. We'll help you find the best structure for your situation.
faq.q5: How does NEM 3.0 affect my savings?
faq.q5a: NEM 3.0 reduced export credits by ~75%, but pairing solar with battery storage (like Tesla Powerwall) offsets this by letting you store energy during the day and use it at peak evening rates. Our designs are optimized for the new NEM 3.0 rules.
faq.q6: Do I need a battery with solar?
faq.q6a: A battery is not required, but it dramatically increases your benefits under NEM 3.0. Without storage, excess solar is exported at low rates. With a battery, you use that energy at night or during outages, maximizing savings. We recommend storage for most new systems.
faq.q7: Will my solar system work during a power outage?
faq.q7a: Standard grid-tied systems shut down during outages for safety. However, systems with Tesla Powerwall or Enphase battery storage continue powering your home during an outage. We size backup systems to cover your critical loads.
faq.q8a: We serve all of Los Angeles County and Southern California, including Arcadia, Pasadena, Monrovia, San Gabriel, Temple City, Alhambra, San Marino, and surrounding communities. Contact us to confirm service at your address.
